prestazioni: Forced induction upgrade via HKS GT-SS Supercharger kit (S06A-5) designed specifically for the S07A turbocharged 660cc 3-cylinder engine, producing 12 psi of boost to achieve 130 hp at the wheels with supporting fuel upgrades including a Walbro 450 LPH in-tank fuel pump and Injector Dynamics ID1000x injectors (1000cc/min) to maintain stoichiometric AFR under load

Full bolt-on drivetrain reinforcement with a K-Tuned lightweight flywheel (6.5 kg) and ACT ProLite clutch (puck-style, 4-pad) to handle increased torque, paired with a Cusco 1.5-way limited-slip differential (LSD) for the N-Box's JF1/JF2 chassis-specific front-wheel-drive transaxle

Suspension overhaul using Tein Flex Z coilovers (N-Box-specific valving) with 20-way adjustable damping, reinforced with SPC Performance front upper control arms (adjustable camber) and Whiteline rear sway bar (22mm, hollow) to mitigate body roll during aggressive cornering on Kei-car-spec 14-inch wheels
estetica: Liberal Motors 'Kei Sport' widebody conversion kit (FRP construction) with integrated over-fenders to accommodate 16x7 +35 Enkei PF05 wheels wrapped in 195/45R16 Yokohama Advan Neova AD09 tires, paired with custom 5x100 to 4x100 hub-centric spacers (15mm) for aggressive flush fitment

Full carbon fiber aero package including a Seibon Carbon hood (with integrated NACA duct for intercooler airflow), Veilside Fortune front bumper lip, and custom 3D-printed rear diffuser (PETG material) with integrated dual 50mm exhaust outlets for the HKS Hi-Power Spec-L exhaust system

Interior transformation with Bride Zeta III Kei-car-spec bucket seats (fixed-back, ultra-low profile) wrapped in Alcantera with red stitching, paired with a Nardi Classic 350mm steering wheel (12.6-inch diameter) and a custom aluminum shift knob (7075-T6, 150g) for the CVT-to-manual conversion using a K-Tuned sequential shifter kit
